text: ECO-178 approved. All three signoffs received. Sarah owns release to manufacturing; Lin owns the verification campaign on revised brackets.
ECO-178 released. Drawings revised to rev C. Engineering build kits will swap in the new bracket starting kit batch 11.
First-article inspection of AlumWest trial lot: tolerance hits ±0.07mm on the critical OD. Tighter than spec. Bracket re-fab pipeline cleared.
BMS hysteresis patch PR #221 up. Tightens deassert from 8°C to 5°C below assert. Includes new chamber test traces in the description.
Reviewed PR #221. LGTM after I rerun chamber sweep on a sample of 3 units. Should clear by tomorrow.
Net status: aluminum risk now Medium (was High). ECO-178 closed the line-stop scenario. Continue dual-sourcing campaign for resilience but no longer a critical path item.
New issue surfacing: gripper arm vibration at the third harmonic of motor speed. Caught it in the endurance rig overnight. Need to characterise before it cascades into PVT planning.
Adding gripper resonance to the risk register. Priya owns characterisation; loop in Raj for motor profile + Tom for any firmware mitigation.
